title: peucedanum stolzii
intro: Peucedanum stolzii, also known as Stolz's masterwort, is a type of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating a range of health conditions. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Peucedanum stolzii can be dried and used to make teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
